race.comment: Most of these won't ever find a better chance to win a race than this. Most of the first starters haven't really set the world on fire at the trials, but there's not a lot of compelling form among the raced brigade. Of those we have seen, STYLISH PRINCE (3) probably comes through the strongest races and his trials in hitouts short of his best have been adequate for a horse competing in this class. PACKERS JOURNEY (8) has race fitness on her side and the way she hit the line last start in a race of more depth than this brings her right into it. FOX FORCE (13) has had a couple of runs back and while a few weeks between runs, has had a 1000m jumpout at Geelong since. ENCHANTED LASS (7) was terrible first up but might have just knocked up late first-up at 1450m. She had trialled well prior and strikes the right race to bounce back. Similarly, CRAZY TOWN (4) had good market support on debut off a nice trial and never gave a yelp but might be better for that.
